title: Distribution Asks Registry
description: Curated registry of GitHub issues tracked as distribution asks for the @adiled portfolio. Source of truth for which issues are tracked. Live state (open/closed, title, comments) is fetched from GitHub on demand and is not duplicated in the registry.

$schema.description: URI of this schema. Optional pointer for editor tooling.

version.description: Schema version. Bump only on a structural change to this file's shape.

description.description: Free-text purpose statement for the registry. Useful for LLM agents loading the file cold.

underTheTablePointer.description: Relative path to the gitignored under-the-table queue. Items not appropriate for public tracking live there.

tracked.description: Array of curated asks. Each entry maps to one GitHub issue.

repo.description: GitHub repo in owner/name form. Example: adiled/clwnd.

number.description: Issue number on the named repo. Live state for this issue is fetched from GitHub, not stored here.

priority.description: P0 blocks a launch. P1 blocks a specific channel or surface. P2 is quality-of-life.

note.description: One-line context to make the registry readable without opening every issue. Optional but recommended.

state.description: Optional curation state. Live open/closed status comes from GitHub. This field carries the curation story when it diverges (e.g. closed but the resolution is worth keeping in the registry, or deliberately deferred).
